entries.name: enrollment-activate-confirmed
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes: activate confirmed enrollments whose season has started.

entries.name: enrollment-promote-waitlisted
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes: promote waitlist top when capacity opens.

entries.name: enrollment-expire-provisional
entries.purpose: Daily 06:00 UTC: expire provisional enrollments past TTL.

entries.name: enrollment-reconcile-team-members
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC: verify atomicity invariant. Every finding is P1.

entries.name: enrollment-purge-completed
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC: hard-purge terminal enrollments past 7-year retention.
